productDisplayName: Nike Men Dual Fusion ST 2 Black Sports Shoes
description: These Dual Fusion ST 2 shoes for men from nike with plush cushioning and supportive Fit are designed for runners. The single-layer mesh upper gives a breathable, comfortable fit while the pylon midsole gives cushioning, support and stability. Flex-foot grooves at the forefoot gives enhanced flexibility. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays Central lace ups Padded tongue with branding Mesh lining in the padded insole Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Waffle patterned lugs on the outsole Decoupled heel shoe care Brush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
